{{Quote|I am sorry, Grandfather Tree.|The Jedi, to an old Massassi tree|<ref name="YJKJUS" />}}
The '''tree-like Jedi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] student at [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]] around the [[Second Imperium Crisis|crisis]] of the [[Second Imperium]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Tree/Legends|treelike]] Jedi was a member of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] by [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]]. Despite being able to move at a slow pace, she would often stand still in the sunlight, contemplating [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and her place in the [[Universe/Legends|universe]]. During the [[Second Imperium Crisis]], the treelike Jedi was tasked with protecting the academy from potential invaders. She once stopped two [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] intruders from the [[Shadow Academy]] by crashing a dying [[Massassi tree/Legends|Massassi tree]] trunk on them. However, this single feat had drained many [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of her energy reserves, and it took a long time to recover from this intervention.<ref name="YJKJUS" />

==Powers and abilities==
Despite her plant-like nature, this Jedi was capable of using a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. She would hold the knobby weapon in a curled, handlike appendage. However, members of her species did not have enough stamina to engage in real [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|duels]], since the mere act of using the saber to cut through a tree trunk would drain them from their energy.<ref name="YJKJUS" />

Through the Force, the Jedi was also able to broadcast her thoughts to nearby organisms, showing [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] skills.<ref name="YJKJUS" />

==Behind the scenes==
This unidentified treelike Jedi was created by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Rebecca Moesta]] for their young adults reader ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]''.<ref name="YJKJUS" /> Several plant-like sentient species are known to exist within the ''Star Wars'' universe, including the [[Neti/Legends|Neti]],<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> the [[Yarin]]<ref name="CCR">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]''</ref> and the [[Unidentified talking tree species|talking trees]] from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="PE">{{Ewoks|Party Ewok}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' {{1st}}
